name: Aanand Mehta
titles: Multi-Cloud Certified Hybrid Solution Enterprise Architect
Certified FinOps Practitioner cum FOCUS Analyst
summary: 2025 FinOps Leadership Summary: Strategic Impact & Key Achievements... As a Senior Specialist FinOps at Nasdaq and an AWS Community Builder, Aanand Mehta is at the forefront of cloud financial management and AI-driven optimization. With over 14 years of experience across global giants like IBM, Capgemini, and DXC, he specializes in bridging the gap between cloud engineering and business value. His 2025 focus includes pioneering AI-integrated FinOps frameworks, enabling data-driven executive decisions, and fostering a global community of cloud financial practitioners. He holds 9+ active certifications across AWS, GCP, and the FinOps Foundation, making him a versatile architect for the hybrid-cloud era.

highlights: Provided technical expertise as a Subject Matter Expert for large-scale enterprise systems
Established and managed the Middleware COE
Optimized enterprise integration patterns and shared services
Designed and implemented complex cloud architectures for enterprise clients
Spearheaded technical vision for digital transformation initiatives
FinOps Cost Analyst: monitored cloud costs, established governance
AWS-MongoDB Assessment SME: conducted assessments, identified optimization opportunities
Led cross-functional teams for large-scale cloud migrations and transformations
